ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing ethnic_groups */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing age_groups */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing genders */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing dhb_of_residence */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the specified demographic group */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing data_sources */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing data_versions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhb_of_residence ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_category" TEXT /* Category of the ethnic group (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dhb_of_residence" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHB */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the DHB */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the DHB is located */,
  "population_coverage" INTEGER /* Population covered by the DHB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 10 to 14) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing roles */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Survey, Census) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each demographic data entry
Population count for the specified demographic group
Date when the data was recorded
Unique identifier for each ethnic group
Category of the ethnic group (e.g., Major, Minor)
Region where the DHB is located
Unique identifier for each age group
Unique identifier for each data source
Type of the data source (e.g., Survey, Census)
Unique identifier for each data version
Timestamp when the version was created
